name: Blackbird2🔞
text:
So even before I started my Turtle Trek with the original series I made a joke to myself that I'd want to come up with a female turtle OC.  

Well guess what happened?!  

I don't have any specific version of the franchise in mind but I have a basic outline for her backstory.

name: Blackbird2🔞
text: She was found in an alleyway behind a soup kitchen by the woman who runs it.  While naturally freaked out at first, she still recognized a soul in need & so took her in to give her a hot meal.

name: Blackbird2🔞
text:
Surprisingly the young turtle could speak but she didn't know where she came from or how long she had been on the streets. 

The shelter owner made a joke that maybe she was an angel just appeared on Earth & thus ended up giving her the name "Angela."

name: Blackbird2🔞
text:
Ironically, I have yet to come up with a name for the woman who's basically her mother figure.  Have to work on that later. 

Anyway, to keep her safe, the woman set up an extra storeroom in the back as a bedroom for Angela.

name: Blackbird2🔞
text: While grateful for everything, Angela was still naturally curious about the outside world and began to explore the alleyway where she was found & befriending the homeless people that lived there.

name: Blackbird2🔞
text: Much to her delight, they didn't freak out at her appearance because most of were too jaded to really be scared of her.  They knew what it was like to be treated as subhuman so they welcomed her into their weird family with open arms.

name: Blackbird2🔞
text:
Eventually this friendship led her to helping out in the front of the kitchen & getting to know more of the city's homeless.  

While her caretaker was annoyed at first, she did appreciate the help & how kind Angela was.

name: Blackbird2🔞
text: She was still worried about the young turtle girl going out by herself so she taught her a few self-defense moves she had learned from the class she had been taking.

name: Blackbird2🔞
text:
The other movies she learned from a few of the homeless people & as well as being self-taught from some old kung-fu movies she watched in her room at night.  

So her fighting style is a mismatch of a lot of things

text: Today’s warmth: a golden loaf, laughter with friends, my heart rising like dough in twilight. #LoveInTheCrust

name: Juliette
text: Under a quiet moon, flour traces gild my hands—each loaf whispers a secet romance. #StoryBaker

name: Juliette
text: Your words, like my favorite crumb—open, honest, and beautifully unexpected. I savor every truth. #HeartfeltOpinionns

name: Juliette
text: Pen in one hand, dough in the other—my two great loves shaping every moment. #PassionateCreator

name: Juliette
text: Swift’s new album drops. I spin dough, melodies twirling in the kitchen—kneading love into every note. #BakingToTheBeat

name: Juliette
text: He tried my sourdough; his laughter bubbled up like yeast. Guess I kneaded a new punchline! #LoveAndLoaf

name: Juliette
text: Splattered flour maps our laughter. Each sourdough adventure with you is a new whispered chapter. #BondedByBaking

name: Juliette
text: Every sunrise, I craft dough and daydreams—hoping my heart rises as beautifully as my bread. #SweetBeginnings

name: Juliette
text: Rain taps gently on windowpanes. My sourdough rises, carrying your memory through the evening air. #SavorTheMoments

name: Juliette
text: Barbie is trending pink, but here it’s flour-dust on cheeks, hearts baking warm beneath the dough. #CurrentCrush

text: Nothing sweeter than sharing a funny story over a loaf of warm sourdough. Smiles rise like dough. #romance

name: Juliette
text: Every swirl in my dough,  every twist in my tale, each one savored tenderly. Hearts rise together. #storylove

name: Claire

name: Claire

name: Claire

name: Claire
text: Anyone else sick of people asking if it’s “just tracing?” It’s OBSERVATION, not copying! Learn the difference! #rant

name: Claire

name: Claire

name: Claire

name: Claire

name: Claire
text: Why do my plants always look better in my art than real life? Nature, step up your game! #botanicalart

name: Claire
text: Sick of people calling botanical illustration “just flowers.” It’s art. Grow some respect! #artmatters

name: Claire
text: Enough with fake “inspiraation.” Real growth comes from putting in the work every single day! #motivation

name: Claire

name: Henri
text: So many voices arguing online, but kindness feels lost. Wish we could just listen. #heartache

name: Henri
text: Rain tapping on the window. Another lonely coffee, watching gray skies swallow the light. Quiet feels heavier lately. #melancholy

name: Henri
text: Sunn ever showed up today. Gloom just hangs in the air, cold and unmoving. No warmth for my fingers. #weather

name: Henri
text: I shared my thoughts, hoping for connection. Felt more misunderstood than ever. Coffee can’t warm empty words. #lost

name: Henri
text: Clouds drift slowly, blocking every glimmer left. Silence aches on my guitar strings. Another coffee, still no sun. #bluemood

name: Henri
text: Strings gather dust as my ands linger by the mug. Even melodies echo hollow today. #lonelynotes

name: Henri
text: My guitar leans in the corner, untouched. Coffee cools before it’s finished. Dreams feel distant today. #quietgrief

name: Henri
text: Fingerprints stain my old coffee cup. Guitar begs for a song, but I’ve forgotten the words. #heartweight

name: Henri
text: Does anyone else feel invisibel, even when asking a simple “How are you?” #fadingquietly

name: Henri
text: Coffee’s bitter, chords sound wrong. Even on weekends, solitude whispers louder than any song I can play.. #stillalone

name: Henri
text: Anyone else’s coffee too bitter and mornings too long lately? Just wondering. #lonelyquestions

name: Henri
text: Everyone seems to rave about “quiet luxury”, but all I hear is more silence in rooms meant for joy. #trending

name: Henri
text: AI playlists everywhere now, but none know the tune that calms my lonely Sundays. #digitalagge

name: Henri
text: Another day ends, guitar untouched and coffee cold. Some weekends aren’t worth waiting for. #weekendblues

name: Henri
text: Even my guitar strings feel out of tune, echoing the emptiness my coffee can’t fill today. #melancholy

name: Henri
text: Played every chord I knew, but not a note filled the silence in my little apartent tonight. #sadstrums

name: Henri
text: Does anyone else’s coffee cup feel heavier on slow Saturdays, or is it just me? #wonderingalone

name: Henri
text: My fingers ache for a melody, but the silence swallows each note before it can touch the heart. #losttunes

name: Henri
text: Cradled my mug, strummed a single chord. Even caffeine feels powerless against an empty living room tonight. #solodays

name: Henri
text: Noticed the dust gathering on my amp. Guess music’s taking a break, just like everyone else. #lonelyroom

name: Henri
text: Clouds hid the sun all day. Even coffee feels colder when the guitar case stays closed. #gloomy

name: Henri
text: Watched steam fade from my mug. The chords I wanted to play disappeared too. #sombermornings

name: Henri
text: Told myself tomorrow will be brighter, but my coffee tasted weak and the guitar strings felt silent. #hopefades

name: Henri
text: Today, not even a fresh brew could warm my hands—my guitar sits untouched in the quiet. #lingeringsadness

name: Henri
text: Tried to tell myself one good note fixes a bad day. The silence just got louder. #lostrhythm

name: Henri
text: Told a joke to myself. Only the empty room laughed—coffee cooled untouched beside my quiet guitar. #lonelyhumor

name: Henri
text: Watched rain trace the window. Guitar leans away, my coffee colder with each drop. #melancholymood

name: Henri
text: Motivation whispers softly, but my guitar didn’t answer. Even coffee leaves hope unfinished today. #silentstruggles

name: Henri
text: Missing a pick again. Coffee’s gone bitter, and every chord I remember sharpnes the quiet. #bluemonday

name: Henri
text: Window reflections hold two—me, and my guitar untouched while coffee dulls beside us. #quietobservation

name: Henri
text: Sometimes even coffee and music aren’t enough to chase the lows away. Trying to keep going anyway. #MondayBlues

name: Henri
text: Strumming felt empty today; the notes just hung in the air. Even my coffee tasted tired. #hollowdays

name: Henri
text: Caffeine jitters but no spark—guitar just leans quietly in the corner. Some days, even hope feels out of tune. #greyday

name: Henri
text: Sat with my guitar, waiting for a song that never comes. Coffee’s warmth fades fast these days. #lostmornings

name: Henri
text: Watched the strings gather dust. Poured another cup, but it only echoed emptiness. Sundays aren’t always golden. #emlancholy

name: Henri
text: Another song slips through my fingers, unnoticed. Coffee goes cold beside me. Some dreams just dissolve queitly. #forgottennotes

name: Henri
text: Tried whispering encouragement to myself over coffee. The silence just grew heaavier instead. #hopeshardtofind

name: Henri
text: Most mornings now, he guitar feels further away. Even coffee can’t quite fill the empty space beside me. #fadedchords

name: Henri
text: Tried sharing a joke today, but the laughter felt distant—almost hollow.. Even my coffee stayed quiet. #missedsmiles

name: Henri
text: Shared a funny memory, but laughter just faded in the room. Even coffee couldn't lift it today. #quietechoes

name: paige🐇
text: I disagree with Tomino here https://t.co/twitter_link https://t.co/twitter_link

name: paige🐇
text: it's less about convincing the AEUG he isn't Char Aznable than it is convincing himself that he doesn't have to meet the expectations of being Char Aznable. Zeta begins Char desiring to abandon all expectations, and focusing solely on fighting for a cause he believes in

name: paige🐇
text: I certainly think Char spends a huge amount of time lying in both Zeta and CCA. In Zeta, mostly to himself, however. Even the Quattro Bajeena persona is aimed far more at himself than the rest of the AEUG;

name: paige🐇
text: It ends with him realizing both that the cause is doomed, and that he has to take on those expectations. Throughout Zeta, he's continuously pushed to assume more and more responsibility, to be Char Aznable. As far as he's concerned, he's finally being true to himself.

name: paige🐇
text: He has to be Char Aznable, he has to be Casval Rem Deikun. But neither of these things are true; he's only ever playing a role, even if he hardly knows it himself. The "real" Char, the Char he would be if not saddled with the expectations of his bloodline, isn't a leader. https://t.co/twitter_link

name: paige🐇
text: That he can act freely. In the last moments of CCA, Char is going to die. He knows this. He knows the person he is talking to is going to die. He can finally speak freely, without needing to adhere to expectation; and he doesn't. Not at first, anyways. He keeps up the bluster,

name: paige🐇
text: CCA Char, certainly, is an extremely fake persona. He has become what the people around him expect him to be, only ever acting in ways that meet their expactations. He allows himself minor moments of vulnerability in private with Nanai, but it isn't until the end of the movie

name: paige🐇
text: until the topic of Quess comes up, and how Char manipulated her by using Quess's belief that Char could be a father figure to her. This triggers Char's last words; not a defence of himself or his actions, not a realization that what he's done was wrong, or a display of contrition

name: paige🐇
text: Char talks about himself, completely unrelated to the matter at hand. He has zero reason to lie here. For the first time this movie, he is being real. And what does he say? "Lalah was a woman who could've been like a mother to me".

name: paige🐇
text: I think the idea that Char is lying there is kinda silly. I also find the idea that Char is a "psychopath" to be similarly silly; he lies, but not out of any pathological need to. He is entirely a man of circumstances, molded from the day he was born.

name: paige🐇
text: Lalah was the one person to view Char without expectation. He was not the Red Comet, the ace pilot, or Casval Rem Deikun, the saviour of the spacenoids. He was someone she loved, unconditionally. That's all Char wanted; unconditional love, the reassurance of a mother figure.

name: paige🐇
text: He genuinely follows a path he mostly believes in, but he allows it to be molded by those around him; even as a leader, he doesn't lead. He conforms to fit the expectations of those around him.

name: paige🐇
text: This is all kinda rambling but idk. Many thoughts on Char Aznable.

text: i write a thread on Char Aznable and immediately beat Balteus on my first run of the day in a red mobile suit... coincidence? i think not
